titleStmt.title: SII 16.172: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 172. (A.R. No. 532 of 1919.) LITTLE KĀÑCHĪPURAM, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the second prākāra in the Āruḷāḷaperumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1471, Saumya, Nija-Vaiśākha ba. 3, Tuesday, corresponding to 1549 A.D., May 14.
In the grant portion it is mentioned that the gift was made on the occasion of the lunar eclipse which occurred on śu. 15 in the previous month (Adhika-Vaiśākha) corresponding to April 12, (Friday).

It records a gift of a plot of land after purchasing it from sthānam Uddaṇḍarāya for 15 varāhas and incurring an expense of 25 varāhas towards converting it into a flower garden for supply of garlands to god Varadarāju by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vallabhayyadēva-mahārāju, son of Rāmarāyani-Varadarāju of Ātrēya-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Sōma-vaṁśa in the name of his mother Kṛishṇamma. The plot of land was made over to Narasayya son of Saṅkīrtana Rāmānujayya stipulating that he should maintain the garden and supply garlands to the god in the name of the donor's mother Kṛishṇamma. Also records the grant of the village Chiṭinañjēri in Poḷḷuri-sīma, the nāyaṅkara territory of Chinna-Timmarājayya, for maintaining out of the income thereof, the flower garden and the tōpu-tiruṇāḷ of the diety.
There is a Tamil version of this record on the same wall in the temple (No. 530 of 1919).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī vijayādbhudaya śālivāhana śakhavaruṣaṁbulu 1471 Agu nēṭi sauvumya saṁvvatsara nijavaiśākha ba 3 maṁgaḷavārāna śrīma(n)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvirā pratāpa śrīvīra sadāśivarāyamahārāyalu pṛthivirājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Ātrēyagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbha sūtraṁ sōmavaṁśā dhīśvarulaina rāmarājarāRead vīra
yani varadarājugāri komāruṁḍu vallabhayyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru tama talligāru kriṣṇaṁmma pēriṁṭa tirunaṁdavanaṁ kāviṁci saṁkirtana rāmānujiya komāruṁḍu narasayaku ceṁdra grahaṇa puṇyakālamaṁddu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigānu saṁttānaparaṁparaṁgānu tirunaṁdavanaṁ śēsukoni Aṁddulō galigina tirupaḍi tāmu varadarājulaku tirumāle kaiṁkaryaṁ naḍupu ka va
cceyaṭa gānunu takkina palavarttu tāmu Anubhaviṁcukoni kriṣṇaṁmma pēriṭa tirumāle vubhayaṁ naḍapaṁgalavārani Iccina tirunaṁdāvanaṁ I tirunaṁdavanaṁ sāgivacceyyaṁ dukuṁnnu tōpu tiruṇāḷlu sāgivacceyyaṁddukuṁnnu sadāsivurāyalu cinnatiṁmarājaya vāriki pāliṁcina poḷluri sīmalōṁ jellivacce ciṭinaṁjeri grāmaṁ dhārāpūrvaṁgānu yicina ciṭinaṁjeri grāmaṁ 1 ki cakra va 60 varahālu
guttaśeśi citravasaṁta tōpu tiruṇāḷlu sāgē Aṁduku muppai varahāluṁnu tirunaṁdavanaṁ sēsē narasayyagāriki muvaivarahālunnu kaṭṭaḍa śēsi kaṁci varadarājulaku Anaṁtamulaina daṁḍamulu samarpiṁci vallabharājugāru tirunaṁdavanaṁ tōputiruṇāḷa vubhayaṁ silā śāsanaṁ stānaṁ vuddaṁḍarāyanicāta krayaṁgānu gonna tirunaṁdavanaṁ tirumaṁjjanaṁ peruvariki paḍamara cikkavoḍela
mōṭūri venaka toṁppu vuttaraṁmunnu . tūrpuṁnnu . paripūrnamaṭhaṁ dīnku dakṣiṇaṁ . yī ceturbhūmulakuṁ naḍuma puṭṭalu gaṭugala kolanu guṁṭṭalu 180 yī nūṭayenabhaiIṁṭiṁnni sthānaṁ vuddaṁḍarāyanicāta krayaṁgā goṁnnaṭṭi cakra va 15 Akṣarālānu padēnu varālu miṭṭalu cakkaṁjeśe Aṁdduku ga 25 vubhayaṁ cēsina varahālu naluvai krayaśāsanaṁ narasayyani śēva Iccina tirunaṁdavanaṁ tōputiruṇāla śilāsāsanaṁ śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
